scripts.dev: npm run build -w @weekly-commit/shared && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -p "[{name}]" -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue.bold,green.bold" "cd backend && ./gradlew bootRun" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w @weekly-commit/shared && cd backend && ./gradlew spotlessCheck
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w @weekly-commit/shared
scripts.test: npm run test -w frontend -- --run && npm run test -w @weekly-commit/shared -- --run && cd backend && ./gradlew test && cd .. && node --test scripts/__tests__/*.test.js
scripts.build: npm run build -w @weekly-commit/shared && npm run build -w frontend && cd backend && ./gradlew build -x test
scripts.check:static: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w @weekly-commit/shared && npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w @weekly-commit/shared && cd backend && ./gradlew spotlessCheck
scripts.check:all: npm run check:static && npm run test && npm run build
